description: Product Description Hair Boost is a daily shampoo that gently cleanses and lifts the hair. Combining almond oil and gold millet, this shampoo helps your hair appear thicker and healthier from root to tip. For all hair types. Indications Hair Boost is a daily shampoo that gently cleanses and lifts the hair. Combining almond oil and gold millet, this shampoo helps your hair appear thicker and healthier from root to tip. For all hair types. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Chloride,Citric Acid,Malus Domestica, Fruit Water, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein,Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Seed Extract, Panicum Miliaceum Seed Extract, Hydrogenated Palm Glycerides, Citrate Tocopherol,Glyceryl Oleate,Glycerin,Sodium Benzoate,Parfum,Limonene,Linalool,Benzyl Alcohol,Benzyl Salicylate,Citronellol,Citral,Geraniol, Eugenol Directions Apply to hair, lather, then rinse with water. Safety Warning Avoid contact with the eye area See more
